nasb.text: We have sent along with him the brother whose fame in the things of the gospel has spread through all the churches;

esv.text: With him we are sending  the brother who is famous among all the churches for his preaching of the gospel.

cnv.text: 我們還派了一位弟兄和他同去，

ccb.text: 我们还要派一位弟兄和他同去，这位弟兄在传福音的事上得到各地教会的赞许。

csbs.text: 我们也打发了一位弟兄与他一起去。这位弟兄在福音工作上受到各教会的称赞；
